top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market
top_signals.summary: The disclosure of additional amendments typically reflects active communication with the SEC and progress in the launch process.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Emperor Naruhito attends luncheon in The Hague
top_signals.summary: The emperor said he hopes the friendly and cooperative ties between Japan and the Netherlands will become deeper and more multifaceted for next-generation youths and children.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
